data.homepage_text: Juno Cash - Private Digital Cash The Future of Privacy is Here Private Digital Cash Built private. Born private. Always private. Get Started Learn More Why Juno Cash Privacy that actually works We've combined the best of cryptographic research with a fair launch model to create the ultimate digital cash. Mandatory Privacy Every transaction uses Orchard protocol. No transparent addresses. No unshielding. The anonymity set is everyone on the network. Unlike optional privacy systems where shielded transactions stand out, Juno Cash makes privacy the only option, strengthening protection for all users. 100% Shielded always 60s Block time Fair Launch 100% to miners. No premine. No founder tax. Zero extraction. CPU Mining RandomX means anyone can participate. No ASIC cartels. Auditable Supply New coins minted visibly, then irreversibly shielded. 21 million cap. Bitcoin's proven monetary policy with real privacy. No Trusted Setup Halo 2 proofs eliminate the need for setup ceremonies. No toxic waste. No trust assumptions. Cryptographically clean. Technology Powered by Zero-Knowledge Proofs Zero-knowledge proofs are the cryptographic breakthrough of the decade. They let you prove something is true without revealing the underlying data. The crypto world uses ZKPs for scaling: zkEVMs, zkRollups, zkBridges. But ZKPs were invented for privacy - proving a transaction is valid without exposing sender, receiver, or amount. If you believe in ZKPs for scaling, you should believe in ZKPs for privacy. Learn about the technology 2-5s Signing time <100ms Verification Battle-tested cryptography Orchard protocol with Halo 2 proofs. Years of research, audits, and real-world usage. Heritage Built on the shoulders of giants We didn't reinvent everything. We combined proven foundations without the baggage. Bitcoin Economics 21M coins. 4-year halvings. Proof of work. Proven over 15+ years. Accessible Mining RandomX CPU mining. No ASIC manufacturers controlling access. Proven Cryptography Orchard + Halo 2. World-class zero-knowledge proofs. No Legacy Baggage Clean start with mature technology. No compromises from day one. "Privacy isn't about hiding. It's about choosing who gets access to your financial information." Philosophy Financial privacy is a right Your bank doesn't broadcast your transactions. Your employer doesn't see your spending. Your neighbors don't know your salary. That's not secrecy. That's normal. Transparent blockchains broke this expectation. With Juno Cash, you regain control. View keys let you selectively share transaction details with anyone you choose. You decide who sees what. You control who sees your transactions Selective disclosure via view keys Get Started Join the network Get a Wallet Download and set up Start Mining Mine with your CPU Whitepaper Read the specs Accept Payments Juno Pay Server for merchants

customer_types.name: Privacy-Conscious Professionals
customer_types.description: Individuals who prioritize financial privacy and data protection in their personal and professional transactions. They seek secure, confidential financial tools.

personas.name: Independent Journalist
personas.description: A freelance journalist concerned about protecting financial information from potential surveillance or professional retaliation.
questions: How can I protect my financial transactions from potential tracking by government agencies?
What mechanisms exist to prevent my payment sources from being exposed?
Can I selectively share transaction details with specific contacts or authorities?
How does this platform prevent my financial activities from being mapped or analyzed?
What safeguards protect my professional network's financial interactions?

personas.name: Remote International Contractor
personas.description: A global freelancer working across multiple jurisdictions, requiring secure and borderless financial transactions.
questions: How can I receive payments without revealing my complete financial history?
What protection do I have against exchange rate manipulations or local financial surveillance?
Can I maintain financial records privately while still complying with tax regulations?
How quickly can I transfer funds across international boundaries?
What happens if my local financial infrastructure becomes unstable?

customer_types.name: Technology Privacy Advocates
customer_types.description: Tech-savvy individuals who deeply understand privacy technologies and seek robust, mathematically-verified financial solutions.

personas.name: Cybersecurity Researcher
personas.description: A technical professional passionate about privacy technologies and verifiable security mechanisms.
questions: What zero-knowledge proof mechanisms ensure transaction integrity?
How does the platform prevent potential side-channel attacks?
Can the anonymity guarantees be mathematically proven?
What cryptographic foundations underpin the privacy model?
How are view keys implemented without compromising overall system privacy?

responses.raw_text:
{
    "privacy_mechanisms": [
        "Stealth addresses: Generate one-time addresses for each transaction to obscure recipient identity",
        "Ring signatures: Obfuscate sender details by mixing transaction signatures with decoy signatures", 
        "Zero-knowledge proofs: Validate transaction details without revealing specific transaction information",
        "Confidential transactions: Encrypt transaction amounts to prevent value tracking",
        "IP address masking: Using VPN or Tor to conceal network origin",
        "Non-custodial wallets: Prevent third-party tracking of transaction metadata"
    ],
    "recommended_technologies": [
        "Monero (XMR)",
        "Zcash (ZEC)", 
        "Dash (DASH)",
        "Juno Cash privacy features"
    ],
    "privacy_level": "High protection against transaction tracing"
}

responses.raw_text:

{
  "query": "zero-knowledge proof mechanisms for transaction integrity",
  "response": {
    "zkp_mechanisms_for_integrity": [
      {
        "mechanism": "zk-SNARKs (Zero-Knowledge Succinct Non-Interactive ARguments of Knowledge)",
        "description": "zk-SNARKs are a type of zero-knowledge proof that are succinct (small proof size) and non-interactive (verifier doesn't need to interact with the prover in real time). They prove that a computation was performed correctly without revealing the computation, input, or output. In the context of transaction integrity, they can demonstrate that the transaction follows the rules of the protocol (e.g., spending only available funds, valid signatures) without revealing the amount or parties involved.",

          "Succinct Proof Size",
          "Non-Interactive",

        "applications": [

          "Mina Protocol",
          "Various Layer-2 scaling solutions"
        ]
      },
      {
        "mechanism": "zk-STARKs (Zero-Knowledge Scalable Transparent ARguments of Knowledge)",
        "description": "zk-STARKs are similar to zk-SNARKs, but they are scalable and transparent, meaning they do not require a trusted setup. They use cryptographic primitives resistant to quantum computer attacks. Like zk-SNARKs, they can prove the validity of a transaction without revealing its details.",
        "properties": [
          "Scalable",
          "Transparent (No Trusted Setup Required)",

          "Cairo (programming language for STARKs)",
          "zkSync"
        ]
      },
